aliases: 康方生物科技（开曼）有限公司
康方生物科技（開曼）有限公司

value.founding_story: Founded in Zhongshan, Guangdong in March 2012 by Michelle Xia (Yu Xia) together with co-founders Peng Zhang, Baiyong Li and Zhongmin Wang, building an in-house antibody discovery platform (the ACE and Tetrabody bispecific platforms) targeting oncology and autoimmune disease.

value.total_raised: at least ~US$464M across disclosed pre-IPO rounds and IPO (Series C + Series D + IPO); full private-round history not fully reconstructed within budget

ipo.price: HK$16.18 per share (top of indicative range, oversubscribed 639.2x)

value.indication: relapsed/metastatic cervical cancer (first indication); later expanded to first-line gastric/GEJ cancer and other solid tumors
value.status: marketed in China as 开坦尼/cadonilimab (AK104), a PD-1/CTLA-4 bispecific antibody described by the company as the first dual immune-checkpoint-inhibitor bispecific approved for marketing globally

value.indication: first-line gastric/GEJ adenocarcinoma (second approved indication for cadonilimab)
multiple solid tumors including NSCLC, gastrointestinal, hepatocellular and colorectal cancer (17 indications in active trials as of 2026)
value.phase: Phase 3 (multiple trials) / out-licensed for ex-China territories
value.status: ivonescimab (AK112), PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody; China rights retained by Akeso, ex-China rights (US, Canada, EU, Japan, and since June 2024 also Latin America, Middle East and Africa) held by Summit Therapeutics

value.upfront: undisclosed (part of deal worth up to US$200M total)
US$500 million (paid as US$300M at closing 2023-01-20 plus US$200M on 2023-03-06)
value.milestones: up to US$4.5 billion in regulatory and commercial milestones (deal described by parties as worth up to US$5 billion total)
value.royalty: tiered double-digit royalties on net sales
value.territory: originally United States, Canada, European Union, Japan; expanded June 2024 to also include Latin America, Middle East and Africa. China and rest-of-world rights retained by Akeso.

value.counterparty: Chia Tai Tianqing Pharmaceutical Group / Sino Biopharmaceutical (joint venture: CTTQ-Akeso)
value.royalty: not applicable — commercialization joint venture, not a royalty-bearing license

value.name: Michelle Xia (Yu Xia)
value.role: Chairwoman, President and Chief Executive Officer
prior: Biochemistry degree, Sun Yat-sen University, Guangzhou (1988)
PhD, molecular biology and microbiology, Newcastle University, UK
